Solana Network Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Announced | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: SOL Breaks Below Key Support & Head-Shoulders Breakout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SOL Breaks Below Key Support & Head-Shoulders Breakout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana confirmed a bearish breakdown from a head and shoulders pattern on March 27, projecting a measured move toward the $73 region.[2][3] The network is consolidating near $78.87 support as of mid-April, trading around $82-$83.[3][4][5]
